chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Transfer Application No.104 of 2024 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ For hg of main case 14.10.2024. Mr. Jamroz Khan Afridi, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Siraj Ali Khan Chandio, Additional Prosecutor General. Learned counsel submits that Special Case No.83-A/2022, arising out of FIR No.23/2020, under section 6/9 C read with Sections 14/15 CNS Act, 1997 is pending for final arguments before the Special Court-II, (CNS) Karachi, which is lying vacant and this case may be transferred to Special Court-I, (CNS) Karachi for disposal. Learned APG has given no objection. Accordingly, this application is allowed and Special Case No.83- A/2022, arising out of FIR No.23/2020, under section 6/9 C read with Sections 14/15 CNS Act, 1997 is hereby withdrawn from the file of Special Court-II, (CNS) Karachi and transferred to Special Court-I, (CNS) Karachi for expeditious disposal. JUDGE HANIF
